ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trading strategy */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trading strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the trading strategy (e.g., risk tolerance, asset allocation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the strategy was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive, in development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the market */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific exchange within the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., stock, forex, futures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., Apple Inc., EUR/USD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Market where the asset is traded */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, currency, commodity) */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issuer of the asset (e.g., company, government) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset expires (for assets with a limited lifespan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy that generated the signal */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset related to the signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of signal (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "signal_date" TEXT /* Date the signal was generated */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Confidence level of the signal */,
  "signal_text" TEXT /* Brief description of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal that triggered the trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, canceled) */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES trading_signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management setting */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy associated with the risk setting */,
  "risk_tolerance" REAL /* Risk tolerance for the strategy */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss level for the strategy */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit level for the strategy */,
  "position_sizing" TEXT /* Position sizing rules for the strategy */,
  "stop_loss_type" TEXT /* Type of stop-loss (e.g., fixed, trailing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., return, volatility) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., return, risk, Sharpe ratio) */,
  "metric_calculation" TEXT /* Calculation method for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, risk manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Browser and device information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading parameter */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy associated with the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., risk tolerance, asset allocation) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "parameter_range" TEXT /* Allowed range of values for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_parameters_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)
